violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee * did not wash hands as necessary. - Both hand sinks were completely dry for in-process food prep and cash register operations. One hand washing station was missing paper towels. Soap dispenser did not dispense soap adequately.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. . - Floors and walls require cleaning.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
